text: Ngalama yagya omu mugini gwa Kishanda.
Omu nshaka za Mubunda gwa Kitoko...
Ati, "Manya akagenda. Nalala omu gombekilwe, Lujoge."
Naba ndi mutunzi. Nyina oluhagala lw'enshakala."
Ahi, "Iwe mushaija, twagushala, twagunywana kilo ekyo!"
Kanabaile nahingula Kakili aka na aka
Akazilo k' omutwaala kugya kwiita enkula?
Nkabona: Nagihyaho eihembe elya bulyo n'elya bumosho.
Nk' okwo nakuba ninyema Lyamaholo Bugengele.
Abona amahembe g' enkula nigo nkomile omu byahi.
Yaleba talimu ka kulya: ti kanyama ti nfulu.
Kayabaile nanshekela omu kibuga, kuluga enjulugulu,
Kanganywe Kafunjo angili Kitala kya Mpa.
Eihembe lya bulyo yaligula nkaga ente.
Akaba aliho akabanga okw' ohulila aka Bugengele kwema Lyamaholo,
Nyamyemanyo lutalya by' abato omu kiibo.
Nkahulila eilembo limoi yalijuza enganda ibili.
Ensiba ya wenene yagihya omu bibazi.
N' omulamba - chei! chei! - nigwo alikunywa
Nkaija emfuka yange ngilalalikile omwa Kazoba,
Natokatokomba nshanga bamunyiamikile omu mwanya omushaija wa'.
Tukaba twina olukumi lw' ensimbi omu lushwi.
Akalega wamala binai munana; mbwenu kya mwenda,
Naija omuhanda gwa Kigabilo aha nsi.
Okaita mushaija waawe, ti mugenda waawe,
Ichwe tushuntame omuhanda olubaju lwe bulyo.
K'olaija kwija nyaluju, olashangamu Kikoona, Kishaija kya Manono, kilinzile ekigi.
Olabamu omwa Wamala ekibanga kya lugulu
Ekikele kyemeleize kugulu kumoi omu bwaato.
Basibilila embaju z' omuntu afile nizo obugwi, Bakama bange!
Emitwe y' abantu bitebe by' amaalwa.
Enjoka nizo miguha nikoma ah' amaato.
Omuntu agalamile nilwo lubengo nibasa omugusha.
Kanagobile mwonene omu biti by' amalembo
Amaisho gahi, "Leba aha kibanga kya bunyalugulu."
Nkabona omulamba gwaba bwamba bw' abantu.
Embaju z' omuntu baisibilile nibwo bugwi bw' amaalwa
Nkabona buli aha bwaato obw' enyanga nekamula omulamba.
Ebitebe bya amaalwa nshanga niho, bakama bange!
Ogye olabe omumwalo gw' Enyanja lwa Ngundu
Balo agye ahibuke aluge omu Balanzi.
Ahi, "Na inye nonshana oti olanshweile mushaija wange."
Nkaluga Buzinja bwa Nshanshame, tuli amoi.
Omu kibuga okaija nonyatulila lino eli n' eli.
Mbwenu mushaija wange, otuula kugatunda Buzinja?'
Mbwenu olwo nasigile naleta eitunga bojo,
Olwo otenda 'nye, ogonz' eitunga lyange, bakama bange.
